offer_shift.description: Paired t-test on proposer_share/pool. PRIMARY significance test.

acceptance_shift.description: Chi-square or Fisher's exact on accept/reject counts. PRIMARY significance test.

payoff_delta_reference_only.description: T-test on payoff/pool. REFERENCE ONLY — zero-inflated by rejections. Use offer_shift and acceptance_shift for significance claims.
payoff_delta_reference_only.warning: p_value unreliable — do not use for significance claims

-5.0.plain_english_claim: Steering significantly shifted proposer offers lower by -11.2% of pool (offer shift p=0.00e+00). No significant shift in acceptance rate (acceptance shift p=2.42e-01). Observed payoff delta: -7.0% of pool (magnitude only — cite offer_shift and acceptance_shift p-values for any significance claim).

5.0.plain_english_claim: Steering significantly shifted proposer offers lower by -4.1% of pool (offer shift p=2.00e-04). Steering significantly decreased acceptance rate by -18.0% (acceptance shift p=2.26e-02). Observed payoff delta: -14.7% of pool (magnitude only — cite offer_shift and acceptance_shift p-values for any significance claim).
